verdict: REFUTED (informatively): GuanScore stayed 1.000 on IA18 -> the IA18 table's GuanScore is ALSO in-sample/outcome-fit; leakage is in BOTH published cohort tables, not just IA12
hypothesis_preregistered: GuanScore would COLLAPSE ~1.0 -> ~0.6 OOD on IA18
hypothesis_outcome: REFUTED (informatively): GuanScore stayed 1.000 on IA18 -> the IA18 table's GuanScore is ALSO in-sample/outcome-fit; leakage is in BOTH published cohort tables, not just IA12
honest_findings: GuanScore C=1.000 on IA18 too -> published mmSYGNAL risk tables carry outcome-fit scores in both cohorts; using them as 'predictions' is leakage in both (stronger leakage finding than pre-registered).
miner_risk (the genuine prediction) C=0.612 [0.531,0.692] OOD -> at the ~0.62 ceiling; mmSYGNAL's real generalizable signal sits at the ceiling.
risk_auc collapses 0.846 (IA12 in-sample) -> 0.655 [0.598,0.715] (IA18 OOD) -> partly leaky, lands at ceiling.
clin_risk 0.774 [0.719,0.823] is SUSPICIOUS on this small (n=86), relapse-enriched (74%) cohort (selection/construction effects) -> NOT claimed.
IA18 program features for the _2 (relapse-timepoint) samples are NOT present (0/881 cols) -> full train-IA12->test-IA18 not possible; pivot to within-IA12 robustness + conformal.
